notes: NEW: Backend mode (optional, OFF by default). Forward traffic to your own Xray/sing-box VPS instead of terminating in the Worker — this unlocks VMess and UDP/voice-video calls (the backend does the protocol + UDP; Nova bridges at the edge). Inspired by cf-xray-proxy. Panel: Network > Backend mode card (toggle + URL + health check, bilingual). Per-user usage/quotas still apply. When OFF, the normal free in-Worker VLESS/Trojan path is 100% unchanged. NEEDS a real backend + live connect-test.
